source.scope: Icons used by Button (node 37:931) + its nested Spinner instance

iconSet.name: Lucide Icons
iconSet.$comment: Apollo v2's `Lucide Icons` boolean token marker (in tokens.json) declares the icon-set source. SVGs in assets/icons/ are stock Lucide — no customizations detected during PoC. If Apollo ever customizes a Lucide icon, the bundle MUST emit a Figma-extracted SVG override and flag $extensions.customized: true.

icons.name: icon/circle-arrow-left
icons.$renderColorNote: SVG uses stroke='currentColor'. Consumers MUST set `color` on the parent (or via fill on icon-bearing slot) to drive the stroke color. Apollo v2 Button binds parent text color = base/{variant}-foreground, so the icon inherits automatically.

figma.synonyms: previous, back, revert, backwards, return, left direction, undo, reverse, preceding, retreat

usedBy.context: default value when showLeftIcon=true (across all non-Loading states + sized variants)
default value when showRightIcon=true (across all states + sized variants)

icons.name: icon/loader-circle
icons.$animationNote: When mounted as the Spinner inner-icon (state=Loading swapDefault), renderers MUST apply a continuous CSS rotation: `animation: spin 1s linear infinite` or equivalent. Lucide's stock SVG carries no animation; rotation is applied by the consumer.

figma.synonyms: rotating circle, spinning round, circulating animation, looping load, cyclical wait, animated ring, cycling preloader, orbiting buffer

usedBy.context: state=Loading swapDefault — replaces user-controllable leftIcon with a fixed Spinner instance
Spinner is its own local component (figmaKey 18665:25956) — wraps LoaderCircle + applies rotation. Used by Button.state=Loading and likely elsewhere across Apollo v2.
usedBy.$ref: Spinner.component.json (not yet emitted — pending atom batch)

$coverage.$comment: Per BUNDLE_SPEC §10.1 coverage requirement: 100% of icons referenced by Button's variant cells are now resolvable to a local SVG file. Spinner component itself is referenced but not yet emitted — that's expected; Spinner is a separate atom that ships with its own .component.json + .variants.json in the atom-batch phase.

expectations.check: Every icon used by Button.variants-samples.json's 3 cells resolves to a file in assets/icons/

details.Default/Default/default cell: showLeftIcon=false in sample; if rendered with showLeftIcon=true → resolves to assets/icons/circle-arrow-left.svg ✓
details.Default/Loading/default cell: Spinner first child → innerIcon resolves to assets/icons/loader-circle.svg ✓
details.Link/Default/default cell: showLeftIcon=false in sample; right-icon slot empty; no icon required ✓

expectations.check: All SVGs use currentColor stroke + 24x24 viewBox

expectations.result: ISC banner in every SVG, source URL in _index.json $metadata.iconSet
